title: Preschool Teachers, Except Special Education
description: Instruct preschool-aged students, following curricula or lesson plans, in activities designed to promote social, physical, and intellectual growth.

tasks.text: Teach basic skills, such as color, shape, number and letter recognition, personal hygiene, and social skills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and enforce rules for behavior and procedures for maintaining order.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adapt teaching methods and instructional materials to meet students' varying needs and interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide a variety of materials and resources for children to explore, manipulate, and use, both in learning activities and in imaginative play.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve meals and snacks in accordance with nutritional guidelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend to children's basic needs by feeding them, dressing them, and changing their diapers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with parents and guardians to discuss their children's progress and needs, determine their priorities for their children, and suggest ways that they can promote learning and development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and lead activities designed to promote physical, mental, and social development, such as games, arts and crafts, music, storytelling, and field trips.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify children showing signs of emotional, developmental, or health-related problems and discuss them with supervisors, parents or guardians, and child development specialists.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain accurate and complete student records as required by laws, district policies, and administrative regulations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Assimilate arriving children to the school environment by greeting them, helping them remove outerwear, and selecting activities of interest to them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate children's performance, behavior, social development, and physical health.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare materials and classrooms for class activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read books to entire classes or to small groups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish clear objectives for all lessons, units, and projects and communicate those objectives to children.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange indoor and outdoor space to facilitate creative play, motor-skill activities, and safety.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach proper eating habits and personal hygiene.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Demonstrate activities to children.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct activities for a balanced program of instruction, demonstration, and work time that provides students with opportunities to observe, question, and investigate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Enforce all administration policies and rules governing students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and implement remedial programs for students requiring extra help.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with other staff members to plan and schedule lessons promoting learning, following approved curricula.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend professional meetings, educational conferences, and teacher training workshops to maintain and improve professional competence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and label materials and display students' work in a manner appropriate for their ages and perceptual skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare reports on students and activities as required by administration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other teachers and administrators in the development, evaluation, and revision of preschool programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and supervise class projects, field trips, visits by guests, or other experiential activities and guide students in learning from those activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with other professionals to discuss individual students' needs and progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select, store, order, issue, and inventory classroom equipment, materials, and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise, evaluate, and plan assignments for teacher assistants and volunteers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer tests to help determine children's developmental levels, needs, and potential.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend staff meetings and serve on committees as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide students with disabilities with assistive devices, supportive technology, and assistance accessing facilities, such as restrooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as hall and cafeteria monitoring and bus loading and unloading.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
